narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 4-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 756 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
